properties.name: Tanger Med
properties.description: 1er port conteneurs d'Afrique et de Mediterranee (9.4 M EVP 2024). Hub de transhipment CMA CGM / Maersk.

properties.name: Casablanca
properties.description: Principal port marocain capacite conteneurs domestiques + vrac. 38 Mt/an.

properties.name: Agadir
properties.description: Port sud du Maroc. Peche + agrumes + conteneurs. Zone franche Souss-Massa.

properties.name: Alexandrie
properties.description: 1er port egyptien. 40% du commerce exterieur. Hub Sidi Kerir + terminal conteneurs.

properties.name: Port-Said (Suez)
properties.description: Entree nord Canal de Suez. ~12% du commerce mondial y transite. Cible houthie 2024-2026.

properties.name: Port Tewfik (Suez)
properties.description: Entree sud du Canal de Suez. Terminal conteneurs + petrolier.

properties.name: Tripoli (port)
properties.description: Principal port libyen. Exposition aux instabilites Tripolitaine/GNA-LNA.

properties.name: Misrata
properties.description: 2e port libyen, zone franche 1999. Route vers Benghazi/Tobrouk. Stabilite relative.

properties.name: Rades (Tunis)
properties.description: Principal port conteneurs tunisien. 80% des imports/exports. Concedee 2019.

properties.name: Bizerte
properties.description: Port nord de la Tunisie. Zone industrielle + petrolier Skhira.

properties.name: Alger
properties.description: Principal port algerien en valeur. Terminal conteneurs concede DP World jusqu'en 2040.

properties.name: Oran
properties.description: 2e port algerien. Hub du Maghreb occidental. Concession DP World 2009.

properties.name: Apapa (Lagos)
properties.description: Plus grand port d'Afrique de l'Ouest. Congestion chronique, 1er marche conteneurs CEDEAO.

properties.name: Tin Can Island (Lagos)
properties.description: Port conteneurs + ro-ro, complementaire d'Apapa. Concede ENL/Ports_and_Cargo.

properties.name: Onne
properties.description: Port oil & gas specialise. Base logistique offshore Niger Delta.

properties.name: Cotonou
properties.description: 1er port du Benin. Transit Niger + Burkina. Concession MSC/Bollore.

properties.name: Lome
properties.description: Hub transhipment ouest-africain. Concede Bollore+MSC. Terminal LCT.

properties.name: Tema
properties.description: Principal port ghaneen. Proche Accra. Meridian Port Services (APM Terminals/Bollore).

properties.name: Takoradi
properties.description: Port ouest Ghana. Hub cacao + hub petrolier offshore Jubilee.

properties.name: Abidjan
properties.description: 1er port francophone d'Afrique (30 Mt). Hub regional CEDEAO.

properties.name: San Pedro
properties.description: 2e port ivoirien. 1er port cacao mondial. Concedee APMT/Bollore.

properties.name: Monrovia
properties.description: Principal port liberien. Transit fer Nimba + caoutchouc. Concede APMT.

properties.name: Freetown (Queen Elizabeth II Quay)
properties.description: Principal port Sierra Leone. Concedee Bollore. Exports bauxite + diamants + cacao.

properties.name: Banjul
properties.description: Port unique gambien. Transit regional Senegal-Gambie. Projet expansion Albreda.

properties.name: Dakar
properties.description: Hub regional Afrique de l'Ouest. Projet mega-port Ndayane (DP World).

properties.name: Ziguinchor
properties.description: Port de Casamance. Transit regional vers Guinee-Bissau.

properties.name: Bissau
properties.description: Port unique Guinee-Bissau. Zone fragile (transit stupefiants).

properties.name: Conakry
properties.description: Port multifonction, export bauxite + or. Concede Bollore.

properties.name: Djibouti Multi-Purpose
properties.description: Porte d'entree maritime de l'Ethiopie. Hub Bab el-Mandeb. 90% commerce ethiopien.

properties.name: Port Sudan
properties.description: Unique port maritime du Soudan. Exposition a la guerre RSF/SAF 2023-2026.

properties.name: Massawa
properties.description: Port erythreen mer Rouge. Cle de desenclavement Ethiopie alternative.

properties.name: Assab
properties.description: Port sud erythreen, base EAU operations Yemen 2015-2021. Reprise activite 2024.

properties.name: Mombasa
properties.description: 1er port Afrique de l'Est. Hub Kenya, Ouganda, Rwanda, RDC Est, Sud-Soudan.

properties.name: Dar es Salaam
properties.description: Corridor Central africain (Tanzanie, Burundi, RDC, Malawi, Zambie). Concede DP World 2023.

properties.name: Zanzibar
properties.description: Port d'ile Zanzibar. Hub touristique + export epices.

properties.name: Durban
properties.description: Plus grand port d'Afrique subsaharienne (89 Mt/an). Hub conteneurs austral.

properties.name: Ngqura (Port Elizabeth)
properties.description: Port a conteneurs vraquier automobile. Expansion Coega SEZ.

properties.name: Cape Town
properties.description: Port mixte conteneurs + peche + reparation navale. Controle Cap de Bonne-Esperance.

properties.name: Luanda
properties.description: Principal port angolais. Corridor Lobito relance 2024 (US-EU).

properties.name: Lobito
properties.description: Corridor Lobito-Benguela reactivé: cuivre/cobalt RDC-Zambie-Angola. Financement G7.

properties.name: Namibe
properties.description: Port sud angolais. Expansion prevue 2024 pour desenclaver Zambie.

properties.name: Pointe-Noire
properties.description: Port en eau profonde bassin du Congo. Concedee Bollore/MSC. Hub petrolier.

properties.name: Libreville-Owendo
properties.description: Principal port gabonais. Terminal conteneurs + bois tropical. Concede GSEZ.

properties.name: Douala
properties.description: 1er port camerounais. Transit Tchad + RCA + Soudan-Sud (corridor nord). Concede Bollore.

properties.name: Kribi
properties.description: Port en eau profonde 2018. Doublon Douala. Concede ICTSI + CCCC (Chine).

properties.name: Walvis Bay
properties.description: Port de la SADC ouest. Expansion chinoise (China Harbour). Alt Durban.

properties.name: Beira
properties.description: Corridor Beira-Harare (Zimbabwe, Zambie, Malawi). Reparations post-Idai 2019.

properties.name: Maputo
properties.description: Porte d'entree Afrique australe Sud. Concedee DP World 2033.

properties.name: Nacala
properties.description: Port en eau profonde. Corridor charbon Moatize (Vale). Concedee par Mota-Engil.

properties.name: Toamasina
properties.description: 1er port de Madagascar. 80% imports. Concedee ICTSI 2005.

properties.name: Mahajanga
properties.description: Port nord-ouest Madagascar. Canal Mozambique. Export vanille + bois.
